SEARCH
Package server.boundary

Class ServerGUI

java.lang.Object
javafx.application.Application
server.boundary.ServerGUI
All Implemented Interfaces:
ServerListener
public class ServerGUI extends Application implements ServerListener
JavaFX GUI for managing the GoNature server. Provides controls for starting/stopping the server, monitoring connected clients, and viewing server activity logs.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    ServerGUI.ClientRow
    Represents a connected client entry displayed in the table.

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class javafx.application.Application

    • buildCard

      private VBox buildCard()
      Returns a blank styled card container.
      Returns:
      a blank styled card container

    • buildControlCard

      private VBox buildControlCard()
      Returns the server-controls card (port, password, start/stop, reachable-at).
      Returns:
      the server-controls card (port, password, start/stop, reachable-at)

    • buildSchedulerCard

      private VBox buildSchedulerCard()
      Builds the scheduler control card: one "run now" button per timed job plus a "Run all jobs now" button. These are the manual triggers used during the defense — each fires an off-cycle run via OrderServer.getScheduler(). The buttons start disabled and are enabled only while the server runs.
      Returns:
      the scheduler-controls card

    • buildSchedulerButton

      private Button buildSchedulerButton(String text, Supplier<String> jobName)
      Creates a full-width scheduler trigger button. When jobName is null the button runs every job; otherwise it runs the named one. Registered in schedulerButtons so the server lifecycle can enable/disable it, and disabled to start.
      Parameters:
      text - the button caption
      jobName - supplies the target job name, or null to run all jobs
      Returns:
      the scheduler trigger button

    • setSchedulerButtonsEnabled

      private void setSchedulerButtonsEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables all scheduler trigger buttons.
      Parameters:
      enabled - whether the buttons should be enabled

    • populateReachable

      private void populateReachable()
      Refreshes the reachable-at list from the LAN interfaces and the entered port.

    • getLanIPv4

      private static List<String> getLanIPv4()
      Returns the host's non-loopback IPv4 LAN addresses (best-effort).
      Returns:
      the host's non-loopback IPv4 LAN addresses (best-effort)

      Returns the connected-clients card with its table.
      Returns:
      the connected-clients card with its table

    • onStarted

      public void onStarted(int port)
      Description copied from interface: ServerListener
      Called once the server has bound and begun accepting connections.
      Specified by:
      onStarted in interface ServerListener
      Parameters:
      port - the TCP port the server is listening on

    • onStopped

      public void onStopped()
      Description copied from interface: ServerListener
      Called once the server has stopped accepting connections and shut down.
      Specified by:
      onStopped in interface ServerListener

    • onClientConnected

      public void onClientConnected(String ip, String host)
      Description copied from interface: ServerListener
      Called when a client establishes a connection.
      Specified by:
      onClientConnected in interface ServerListener
      Parameters:
      ip - the client's IP address
      host - the client's resolved host name (may equal the IP)

    • onClientDisconnected

      public void onClientDisconnected(String ip, String host)
      Description copied from interface: ServerListener
      Called when a client's connection is closed or lost.
      Specified by:
      onClientDisconnected in interface ServerListener
      Parameters:
      ip - the client's IP address
      host - the client's resolved host name (may equal the IP)

    • onLog

      public void onLog(String message)
      Description copied from interface: ServerListener
      Called to report a normal activity message for the operator's log.
      Specified by:
      onLog in interface ServerListener
      Parameters:
      message - the human-readable log line

    • onError

      public void onError(String message)
      Description copied from interface: ServerListener
      Called to report a failure that should stand out in the operator's log.
      Specified by:
      onError in interface ServerListener
      Parameters:
      message - the human-readable error description

    • appendLog

      private void appendLog(boolean ok, String message)
      Prepends a timestamped entry to the activity log (capped at 200 lines).
      Parameters:
      ok - true for a normal entry, false for an error
      message - the log message

      private Button buildPrimaryButton(String text, String icon)

      icon - the leading glyph
      Returns:
      the styled button
